cells.rationale: A cross-cutting main-event-loop scheduling seam with a subtle correctness invariant — wall-clock-budgeted yield/resume from durable watermarks with no lost or repeated work and re-fold determinism preserved — is a nameable intelligence-bound opus gate at the contract-shaped xhigh band.

Substantial but well-specified throughput work atop task-1's budget seam with a nameable acceptance (drain to watermark, keep-set invariants already test-guarded, sub-5s ingest freshness) routes GPT-first to the multi-file workhorse at the model-default band.

Multi-surface but well-specified observability work — a status lag field, a bounded distress mint/clear following established projection patterns, and one attributed breach log line, each with a pinned deterministic test — routes GPT-first to the substantial-implementation tier at high.
